layman_headline: Extreme Fear grips the market — no clean swing trade setup available right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is in 'Extreme Fear' mode with a score of just 25 out of 100, and Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.8%, which means money is flowing away from altcoins and into Bitcoin. While several coins have dropped sharply, none of the candidates show the combination of strong chart structure, reasonable RSI, and a clear catalyst needed for a high-confidence swing entry. Most oversold coins like BONK and NIGHT have strongly bearish chart patterns suggesting more downside, while coins bouncing like LDO and ONDO have already moved 18-27% in a week and look extended.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The market is fearful but hasn't shown clear bottoming signals on altcoins yet. Watch for BTC to break above $68,000 — if it does, altcoin setups will improve dramatically. Patience here protects capital.
expert_reasoning: This cycle presents a classic trap for swing traders: extreme fear tempts contrarian entries, but the actual chart structures on oversold candidates (BONK at -2.0 bias, NIGHT at -0.7, MON at -0.7) all confirm ongoing downtrends with bearish patterns like Three Black Crows. The coins showing bullish momentum (LDO +51.7% in 5 days, ONDO +27.4% in 7 days) are already extended with RSIs pushing toward overbought and terrible risk/reward ratios (0.38x). DEXE shows a massive data discrepancy — price listed at $8.11 but chart analysis references $36.27, with an RSI of 71 (overbought) despite an alleged -80% weekly drop. This data inconsistency makes it untradeable. BTC dominance at 56.8% actively suppresses alt performance. The prudent move is to wait for either a clean oversold bounce setup with confirming bullish candle patterns, or for BTC to resolve above $68K resistance creating conditions for alt rotation.
risk_factors: BTC rejection at $68K could accelerate alt selling and push Fear & Greed below 20
Russia's retail crypto investment cap and BIS stablecoin warnings signal increasing global regulatory headwinds
High BTC dominance (56.8%) means even if BTC rallies, alts may continue to underperform
watch_list: BTC price action at $68,000 resistance — a clean breakout could trigger alt rotation opportunities
BONK RSI dropping below 30 with a bullish reversal candle (hammer/morning star) would create a high-quality oversold bounce setup
Fear & Greed index — a move below 20 often marks capitulation bottoms ideal for entry
market_context: The crypto market is in Extreme Fear (25/100) with BTC testing $68K resistance while dominance remains elevated at 56.8%. Altcoins are bleeding as capital concentrates into Bitcoin, creating a hostile environment for alt swing trades until BTC direction resolves.
context_banner: Extreme Fear conditions with high BTC dominance — no altcoin setup currently offers sufficient risk-adjusted edge for a swing entry.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25/100 with flat trend suggests we haven't reached capitulation yet — too early for contrarian alt entries without confirming reversal patterns.
Best oversold candidates (BONK 31, MON 38, NIGHT 39) lack bullish reversal candles to confirm bottoming, while momentum plays (DEXE 71, ONDO 62) are overbought or extended.
BONK shows Three Black Crows with -2.0 bias score (strongly bearish), while LDO shows Three White Soldiers but with 0.38x risk/reward — neither offers a good swing entry.
Bitcoin rally facing key test at $68K with analysts noting 'summer slumber' — suggests range-bound BTC which keeps alt rotation on hold.
Analyst notes crypto breakout could accelerate as AI trade cools — a potential future catalyst, but not actionable until BTC confirms above resistance.
